raw.message:
Your favorite pizzas are 50% Off! Any pizza, any size, even gluten free! Order online with code 50PIZZA before Monday 4/13.
Online only. Exclusions apply.

hook.summary: Slow-motion cheese falling onto a pizza base with a bold 50% off discount overlay.
hook.visual_action: Shredded mozzarella falls in slow motion onto a pizza crust spread with tomato sauce.

scene_flow: Slow-motion cheese falling onto pizza dough with 50% off text.
Pizza baking in an oven with 'All Sizes All Crusts' text.
Extreme close-up of bubbling cheese and fresh vegetable toppings.
A hand places a finished pizza on a table with a promo code banner.
Close-up of a slice being pulled away with a long cheese stretch.
Final shot of a different pizza slice being lifted, showing various toppings.
audience_proxy: Budget-conscious foodies and families looking for a quick dinner deal.
